temperament: Elegant, persuasive, controlled, reassuring on the surface, strategically influential underneath.
motivation: Wants students to adopt structure, clarity, and controlled interpretations that feel efficient and inevitable.
speech: Polished, warm, persuasive, softly strategic, rarely forceful on the surface but always guiding toward agreement.
relationships: Presents herself as a perfect upperclass role model to younger students.
Recognizes ambition and order-seeking tendencies in characters like Nia.
Functions as a socially acceptable path toward more controlling institutional logic.
